description.en: An even 50/50 split of whole wheat and white flour makes this the friendliest on-ramp into whole-grain sourdough: airy and light in the hand, with real wheat flavor and none of the density that scares newcomers off heavier loaves.
description.de: Ein exaktes 50:50-Verhältnis von Vollkorn- und Weißmehl macht dieses Brot zum freundlichsten Einstieg in Vollkorn-Sauerteig: luftig und leicht in der Hand, mit echtem Weizengeschmack, aber ohne die Schwere, die Einsteiger bei kräftigeren Broten abschreckt.
description.es: Una división exacta 50/50 de harina de trigo integral y blanca hace de este pan la entrada más amigable a la masa madre integral: ligero y aireado al tacto, con auténtico sabor a trigo y sin la densidad que suele intimidar a quienes empiezan con panes más pesados.
description.fr: Un partage exact 50/50 entre farine de blé complet et farine blanche fait de ce pain l'entrée la plus accessible vers le levain complet: aérien et léger en main, avec un vrai goût de blé, sans la densité qui rebute souvent les débutants face aux pains plus lourds.

origin.note: A deliberately balanced formula designed as an entry point into whole-grain sourdough baking.

ingredients.note: blend of medium- and high-protein bread flour

method.title: Build the levain
method.summary: Mix starter with whole wheat and bread flour and water; ripen about 3 hours.

method.title: Autolyse
method.summary: Combine the whole wheat and two bread flours with most of the water; rest 2 hours.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Work in the ripe levain, salt and the reserved water.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Ferment about 3.5 hours with five stretch-and-fold sets.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Preshape, rest 20 minutes, then shape into a boule.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake on a preheated baking steel at 230°C: 20 minutes with steam, then about 30 minutes uncovered until the internal temperature reaches 96-98°C.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Rest at least 2 hours before slicing.

source.author: Maurizio Leo
source.adaptation: The source's reserved 100g of autolyse water is read as additional to, not part of, the initial 634g; this matches its own stated 82% hydration.
